findings.claim: A- prefixation strong-lead adjudication: segmentation/inventory robustness (>=2 schemes) + best-of-universe maxT + LOMO + matched adaptive null for the campaign's strongest LA positive.
findings.verdict: REPLICATED_RELATIVE_CONSTRAINT -- A- is the TOP best-of-universe maxT survivor at family-adjusted p<=.01 under ALL 3/3 independent segmentation schemes, including the harder function-restricted numeral-anchored ledger-head scheme (n=467, A-initial=28, A z=7.49 still rank-1).
